summary: Iteration 265: Fallback Pipeline System - All features verified working. (1) GET /api/pipeline/preview/{job_id} returns full scene data with images, audio URLs, story text, fallback download URLs - PUBLIC endpoint, no auth required. (2) GET /api/pipeline/assets/{job_id} returns presigned URLs for individual assets - requires auth, admin can view any job. (3) POST /api/pipeline/notify-when-ready/{job_id} subscription works - returns already_done for PARTIAL status jobs. (4) GET /api/pipeline/status/{job_id} includes fallback data in response. (5) Geo-IP currency detection on /api/cashfree/products works correctly - x-country: US returns USD, x-country: IN returns INR. (6) Story Preview page at /app/story-preview/{jobId} renders correctly with scenes, audio player, fallback downloads sidebar. (7) Gallery handles showcase items properly. (8) Admin panel endpoints all return 200 (regression verified).

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays content initially - minor UX issue, does not block functionality

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: /api/pipeline/preview/{job_id} - Public endpoint returns scene data with presigned R2 URLs for images/audio, fallback_video_url, story_pack_url
VERIFIED: /api/pipeline/assets/{job_id} - Auth required, returns individual presigned URLs for all assets including images, audio, fallback_video, story_pack_zip
VERIFIED: /api/pipeline/status/{job_id} - Includes fallback object with status, fallback_video_url, story_pack_url, has_preview, preview_scenes
VERIFIED: /api/cashfree/products - Geo-IP detection via x-country header returns correct currency (USD/INR) and pricing
VERIFIED: StoryPreview.js - Full preview page with scene viewer, audio playback, downloads sidebar, fallback banner for PARTIAL status
VERIFIED: Gallery.js - handlePreview navigates to story-preview for items without video URL

FEATURE_2_ASSETS_ENDPOINT.description: GET /api/pipeline/assets/{job_id} returns individual downloadable asset links

FEATURE_5_GEOIP_CURRENCY.description: Geo-IP currency detection on Cashfree products

test_results.x-country: US: Returns USD with $ symbol and priceUsd values
test_results.x-country: IN: Returns INR with ₹ symbol and price values

FEATURE_6_STORY_PREVIEW_PAGE.description: Story Preview page renders correctly at /app/story-preview/{jobId}

FEATURE_7_GALLERY_SHOWCASE.description: Gallery handles showcase items without video URL
FEATURE_7_GALLERY_SHOWCASE.frontend_behavior: Navigates to story-preview for items without video URL

seed_data_creation: None - used existing failed pipeline jobs with fallback outputs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 265: All fallback pipeline features working. Preview endpoint is PUBLIC (no auth). Assets endpoint requires auth (owner or admin). Two test jobs available: d870c412 has both fallback video and story pack, b2fe2b5d has story pack only. Geo-IP currency detection works with x-country header. Story Preview page at /app/story-preview/{jobId} shows fallback banner, scene viewer, audio playback, and download buttons.
